name: om6220
description: OM6220 / HS6220 / RW1602 2.4GHz RF, ACK/hopping, RTC/IRQ, and NY8 firmware development expertise.

interface.shortDescription: OM6220 and RW1602 2.4GHz RF firmware guidance.
interface.longDescription: Provides OM6220 / HS6220 / RW1602 2.4GHz RF firmware expertise for ACK/retry, 2 ms hopping protocols, NY8 SPI timing, IRQ indicator behavior, RF RTC, low-power wakeup, and logic-analyzer-based debugging.
